title: The Great Defender
writer: John Hastings Turner, Paul Perez, Marjorie Deans
actors: Matheson Lang, Margaret Bannerman, Arthur Margetson
plot: Sir Douglas Rolls had earned the reputation of being England's greatest barrister. But he has just been informed by Doctor Hackett, specialist on diseases of the heart, that overwork has taken its toll and if Sir Douglas does not ...
